nasb.text: I will write on the tablets the words that were on the former tablets which you shattered, and you shall put them in the ark.’

esv.text: And I will write on the tablets the words that were on the first tablets that you broke, and you shall put them in the ark.’

cnv.text: 我要把你摔碎的先前那兩塊版上的話，寫在這兩塊版上；你要把它們放在櫃中。’

ccb.text: 我要把你摔碎的那两块石版上的话重新写在你凿的石版上。你要把它们放在柜子里。’
